## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Code compiles and tests pass
- [ ] Conventional Commits used
- [ ] PR targets `develop` branch
- [ ] CODEOWNERS reviewed

## Wave Rules
- Branch from `develop`, name: `feat/<scope>` or `fix/<scope>`
- Squash merge only
- No direct pushes to `main`
